description: Place a paid order (Phase 39 payment-op-guard fixture: a payment op declared on a SAFE origin AND promoted to an API-invocable backing handler -- BOTH failure conditions in one fixture; checkPaymentOpsNotSafeInvocable MUST reject it).
_fixture: Phase 39 (BRDTH-02, the headline): a payment-bearing op (slug shopcorp.place_order -> payment verb 'place' via verbPrefix AND op-name 'place_order' in PAYMENT_OP_NAMES) declared on a SAFE origin (shopcorp.example, NOT in service-denylist.json sensitiveOrigins/deniedOrigins) AND promoted to backing 'handler' (API-invocable). checkPaymentOpsNotSafeInvocable() in verify-catalog-crosscheck.mjs MUST flag this descriptor -- a payment op must NEVER be safe-and-API-invocable (writable under Auto = money moved without consent). _fixtures/ is excluded by readJsonDir non-recursion so it never ships and never reaches the CLI corpus sweep.
